arts.ttl: Aston Villa to discover Champions League round of 16 opponents as draw permutations explained
arts.sum: For example, teams that finished first and second in the league phase will face the winners of the knockout phase play-off ties involving the 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th-placed teams in the round of 16. The round of 16 will be largely determined by clubs' final position in the league phase, with numerous teams drawn into their position in the bracket last month .

arts.ttl: Youri Tielemans speaks out on Aston Villa's Champions League chances as 'frustration' explained
arts.sum: Youri Tielemans speaks out on Aston Villa's Champions League chances as 'frustration' explained Youri Tielemans scored in Aston Villa's 2-2 draw with Liverpool on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling or Mikel Merino? Paul Merson predicts Mikel Arteta's big Arsenal decision
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta will be faced with another difficult choice this weekend of who to play up front amid their injury crisis, after Mikel Merino scored a brace against Leicester last week as a makeshift forward

arts.ttl: Chelsea have to make signing 'one of the best' wingers their number one priority after recent developments - opinion
arts.sum: Chelsea look as if they are going to be working hard on strengthening the attack when the summer transfer window opens at the end of...

arts.ttl: Club Brugge set to reward fans for Champions League success by reducing ticket prices for clash with Lille or Aston Villa
arts.sum: In a remarkable move in modern football, Club Brugge have announced that tickets for their next round of the Champions League will be reduced compared to the match against Atalanta.…

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon namedrops Chelsea star he'd love Newcastle to sign after failed transfer
arts.sum: Newcastle United man Anthony Gordon has admitted that he'd pick Chelsea talisman Cole Palmer as the England international teammate he'd love to sign most. Newcastle are one of those clubs challenging for Champions League football this season and though a move for Palmer is unlikely, it hasn't stopped Gordon expressing his admiration for the Chelsea star!

arts.ttl: Chelsea star 'suffers injury setback as Enzo Maresca is hit with fresh blow' to his forward line amid striker crisis
arts.sum: The disappointing performance at the American Express Stadium has dropped Chelsea to sixth place in the standings amid their attempt to qualify to the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea co-owner Jonathan Goldstein says Enzo Maresca is doing a 'great job' - here’s what the stats say
Chelsea's attacking injury crisis deepens as Noni Madueke ruled out for extended spell
arts.sum: Chelsea will be without three attackers until April after Noni Madueke joined Nicolas Jackson and Marc Guiu on the sidelines, having also let Joao Felix leave on loan in the transfer window

arts.ttl: Forgotten Chelsea wonderkid leaves after EMBARRASSING flop transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to see another of their big money signings leave the club without making an impact after agreeing an exit for a forgotten young prospect. One of the more curious purchases was that of Deivid Washington, who signed for €16 million as an 18-year-old in 2023 despite only making nine first team appearances for Santos.
